summary: Recent changes in the graphics configuration of Firefox introduced a new component called **PDMFactorySupport**, which manages preferences and graphics variables more effectively. This enhancement allows the browser to better handle different types of media processing and support, ensuring that graphics rendering is optimized according to user settings or hardware capabilities. Such improvements are crucial for a smoother browsing experience, particularly for media-heavy tasks like video playback and gaming, _though users might not notice immediate visual differences_.
